accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; the description of the amended provision and its operation is correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all references to the Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act and the specific provisions match.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as revising royalty management for units and communitization agreements under the 1982 Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains that section 111(j) of the Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act of 1982 is amended.

exceptions_conditions.why: Correctly notes the Indian lands exclusion and the condition for interest waiver (full and timely payment).

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the 120-day deadline, interim reporting per proposed allocation, correction deadline, interest waiver, and Indian lands exclusion.

concise.why: Somewhat verbose for the single-provision bill; some structural explanatory material could be condensed.

correct_entities.why: Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act of 1982 and Secretary of the Interior correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 120-day deadline and 'end of third month' correction window match the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
